message:
test(circuit_breaker): add repro for half-open probe count overflow at 2^24

Adds a focused reproduction test demonstrating that the circuit breaker
policy builder accepts half_open_max_probes values exceeding the 24-bit
internal representation limit (16,777,216). When the probe counter
reaches 2^24, to_bits() masks it to zero and the breaker incorrectly
permits the next probe—silently violating the configured limit.

The test documents this gap: the builder happily stores 20,000,000 but
the state machine's 24-bit field cannot represent values above
16,777,215, meaning any configuration above that threshold silently
wraps to zero during runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
